productDisplayName: Clarks Women Arizona Metallic Leather Silver Ballerinas
description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Arizona slip-ons from clarks. The leahter stitch detailing around the mouth of the shoe and the pleated look gives an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look.UpperLeather uppers for durability and comfortMetallic colour, stitch detailing on the mouth of the shoe and pleated effect for added styleLeather line for added comfortMidsoleLushly cushioned footbed with a perforated cushion on the forefoot for absolute comfortOutsoleRubber outsole with circular nubs on the forefoot and heel for better gripFlex grooves on the forefoot and heel for better flexibilty of the feetShoe careUse a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shiningWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
